ENT 118A.title: The Vocation of Business
ENT 118A.prereq_text: Open to first year students in the Busch School with 6 or fewer credits
ENT 118A.notes: Maximum 6 credits earned at time of enrollment

MGT 123A.title: Foundations of Business
MGT 123A.prereq_text: Open to Freshmen Business majors in the spring of freshman year only

MGT 123B.title: Foundations of Business
MGT 123B.prereq_text: Open to majors and minors in the School of Business with sophomore or higher class standing

MGT 250.title: Business Communications
MGT 250.prereq_text: Open to Busch School majors who have completed at least 27 credit hours

SRES 290.title: International Political Economy
SRES 290.prereq_text: List A: SRES 101, SRES 101H, ECON 102, or ECON 104; AND List B: SRES 102, SRES 102H, ECON 101, or ECON 103

ACCT 205.title: Introductory Accounting
ACCT 205.prereq_text: Open to students with at least 24 credits who are Busch School/Economics students or pursuing a business minor

MKT 345.title: Marketing Management
MKT 345.prereq_text: Junior standing; ACCT 205; SRES 101, SRES 102, or equivalent economics course

MGT 301.title: Ethics in Business & Economics
MGT 301.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; MGT 123A or MGT 123B

ACCT 442.title: Accounting Ethics
ACCT 442.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; MGT 123A or MGT 123B

MGT 321.title: Commercial Transactions
MGT 321.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; Busch School major or minor

MGT 322.title: Business Organizations and Property Rights
MGT 322.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; Busch School major or minor

MGT 371.title: Government Regulation of Business
MGT 371.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; Busch School major or minor

BUS 199.title: Exploration: Career Discernment I
BUS 199.prereq_text: Open to incoming majors in the Busch School of Business

BUS 299A.title: Application: Career Discernment II
BUS 299A.prereq_text: Sophomore Business/Economics major; 24+ credits; BUS 199 completed

MGT 265.title: Intro to Business Analytics
MGT 265.prereq_text: Math placement score 1 or 2; OR C- or better in MATH 110, 111, 112, 121, or 122; OR passing grade in MATH 11
MGT 265.notes: Equivalent to ECON 223; may count MATH 114 or HSSS 203

MGT 365.title: Quantitative Methods in Decision Making
MGT 365.prereq_text: MGT 123A or MGT 123B; ECON 223 or equivalent statistics course
MGT 365.notes: Pre-Fall 2024 core; replaced by MGT 265 in post-2024 catalog

MATH 110.title: Applied Mathematics for Business
MATH 110.prereq_text: Math placement level 3; not open to students who have taken MATH 111
MATH 110.notes: Level 3 math placement required; fulfills Liberal Arts Math requirement

MATH 111.title: Calculus for Social-Life Sciences I
MATH 111.prereq_text: Math placement score 1 or 2; OR grade of P in MATH 11 or MATH 21; OR C- in MATH 108, 109, or 110

MGT 240.title: Management of Information
MGT 240.prereq_text: ENT 118A or ENT 118B (or MGT 118); MGT 123A or MGT 123B

MGT 331.title: Data Strategy
MGT 331.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; Busch School major/minor or Data Analytics minor

MGT 351.title: Intro to Business Intelligence
MGT 351.prereq_text: Junior or higher standing; Busch School major/minor, Data Analytics minor, or Certificate in Intelligence Studies

MGT 361.title: Business Analytics
MGT 361.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; Busch School major/minor or Data Analytics minor

MGT 475.title: Business Strategy
MGT 475.prereq_text: Senior standing; ACCT 206, FIN 226, MKT 345, MGT 123A or MGT 123B all completed

BUS 498.title: Undergraduate Comprehensive Assessment
BUS 498.prereq_text: Senior standing; ACCT 206, FIN 226, MKT 345, MGT 123A or MGT 123B all completed

MGT 310.title: Leadership & Organization
MGT 310.prereq_text: Sophomore or higher; MGT 123A or MGT 123B

MGT 311.title: Organizational Behavior
MGT 311.prereq_text: Sophomore or higher; MGT 123A or MGT 123B

MGT 410.title: Conflict Resolution
MGT 410.prereq_text: Junior standing or higher; MGT 123A or MGT 123B; MGT 250

FIN 391.title: Banking & Financial Crisis
FIN 391.prereq_text: FIN 332; prior or concurrent enrollment in FIN 334

MGT 389.title: International Financial Management
MGT 389.prereq_text: Junior or higher standing; FIN 226; MGT 123A or MGT 123B

SRES 333.title: Economy and Society in Contemporary China

MGT 382.title: Business Environment in Central & Eastern Europe

MKT 457.title: Marketing Strategy
MKT 457.prereq_text: Junior or higher; MKT 345; MKT 346 or MKT 348

MKT 325.title: Sports Marketing
MKT 325.prereq_text: Junior or higher; MKT 345 (BSBA) OR Sports Management minor

MGT 347.title: Technology, Innovation, and Design
MGT 347.prereq_text: Junior or senior; MGT 240 or MGT 331

MKT 422.prereq_text: Sales or Marketing specialization or Sales minor; MKT 349; senior standing (junior by exception)

MKT 495A.title: Internship
MKT 495A.prereq_text: Sophomore or higher; Busch School student

MKT 435.prereq_text: MKT 349; Sales specialization or Sales minor; senior standing (junior by exception)

SRES 260.prereq_text: Math placement score 1 or 2; OR C- or better in MATH 108, 110, 111, 112, 121, or 122

SRES 476.title: Spirit of Entrepreneurial Capital
SRES 476.prereq_text: Busch School junior or senior with ENT co-specialization; non-Busch juniors/seniors by instructor permission

MGT 332.title: Technology and Operations Management
MGT 332.prereq_text: MGT 365 (pre-2024) or MGT 265 (post-2024); junior or higher standing

DA 401.title: Introduction to Data Science and Python

ACCT 312.title: Cost Accounting
ACCT 312.prereq_text: ACCT 310 with a grade of B or better

ACCT 417.title: Government & Non-Profit Accounting
ACCT 417.prereq_text: ACCT 311 with a grade of B or better
